notes:
v1.4.2 Update
v1.4.0 main update:
- Added four shop themes: FRENZY, Astra, Dustroad, and Paper Moon.
- Added Stock Pools with weighted Folder/Compendium rolls and reusable world presets.
- Added service entries that can take payment and run a GM-side macro without granting an item.
- Added category tag color controls, purchase/sell chat notifications, movable windowed shops, and Ctrl/Cmd-click preview field jumping.
- Added Cosmere RPG currency support through GlitchSmith Library 0.7.0.
- Added the Purchase Interceptor API for modules that need to block or allow purchases before currency, inventory, or stock changes.

v1.4.1 patch:
- Fixed the Foundry VTT v13 toolbar issue where clicking the Stylish Shop toolbar button could leave Token Controls unclickable.

v1.4.2 patch:
- Fixed FRENZY shops showing category glyphs instead of item artwork in the buy list and focused item detail panel.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.4.2
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.4.2 includes the v1.4.0 feature update plus the latest small patches.

v1.4.0 main update

  • Four new themes: FRENZY, Astra, Dustroad, and Paper Moon.
  • Stock Pools for weighted Folder/Compendium rolls, plus reusable world presets.
  • Service entries that take payment and can run a GM-side macro without granting an item.
  • Category tag color controls, purchase/sell chat notifications, movable windowed shops, and Ctrl/Cmd-click preview field jumping.
  • Cosmere RPG currency support through GlitchSmith Library 0.7.0.
  • Purchase Interceptor API for modules that need availability checks, quest gates, or other pre-purchase rules.

v1.4.1 patch

  • Fixed the Foundry VTT v13 toolbar issue where clicking the Stylish Shop toolbar button could leave Token Controls unclickable.

v1.4.2 patch

  • Fixed FRENZY shops showing category glyphs instead of item artwork in the buy list and focused item detail panel.
